200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while when an ally gains a debuff, Shield of the Empire reduces damage dealt to that ally by 10% for 5 sec and increases that ally’s max health by 10% of own max health for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while when an ally gains a debuff, Shield of the Empire reduces damage dealt to that ally by 20% for 5 sec and increases that ally’s max health by 20% of own max health for 5 sec. When Shield of the Empire gains a debuff, they steal 10% health, as well as physical and magic armor from the enemy who cast this effect for 10 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Shield of the Empire also removes a random debuff from a random ally and restores health to that ally equal to 150% of their own physical armor. The ability triggers only once per 2 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while when an ally gains a debuff, Shield of the Empire reduces damage dealt to that ally by 40% for 5 sec and increases that ally’s max health by 40% of own max health for 5 sec. When Shield of the Empire gains a debuff, they steal 25% health, as well as physical and magic armor from the enemy who cast this effect for 10 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Shield of the Empire also removes a random debuff from a random ally and restores health to that ally equal to 200% of their own physical armor. The ability triggers only once per 2 sec. Every 1 second, Shield of the Empire removes a random debuff, increases own max health by 15% for 10 sec, and restores health to all allies equal to 15% of own max health. Stacks up to 10 times.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire enhances that ally’s damage by 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, Shield of Empire increases that ally’s physical and magic pierce by 1% of their max health for 5 sec.

description 4/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire enhances that ally’s damage by 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, Shield of Empire increases that ally’s physical and magic pierce by 1% of their max health for 5 sec. When receiving a debuff, Shield of the Empire deals physical damage equal to 10% of own max health to the enemy who cast this debuff. The ability triggers only once per 2 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire enhances that ally’s damage by 25% for 5 sec. Additionally, Shield of Empire increases that ally’s physical and magic pierce by 1% of their max health for 5 sec. When receiving a debuff, Shield of the Empire deals physical damage equal to 10% of own max health to the enemy who cast this debuff. The ability triggers only once per 2 sec. Every 1 second, Shield of the Empire deals physical damage equal to 2% of their max health to all enemies in a small radius around the unit.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire also increases that unit’s physical and magic armor as well as fortitude by 15% of own max health for 5 sec.

description 4/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire also increases that unit’s physical and magic armor as well as fortitude by 15% of own max health for 5 sec. When receiving a debuff, Shield of the Empire gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 40% of their max health. The shield absorbs all damage and lasts for up to 4 sec. The ability triggers only once per 6 sec.

description 6/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire also increases that unit’s physical and magic armor as well as fortitude by 15% of own max health for 5 sec. When receiving a debuff, Shield of the Empire gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 40% of their max health. The shield absorbs all damage and lasts for up to 4 sec. The ability triggers only once per 6 sec. Every 1 second, if Shield of the Empire health is below 30%, they restore 3% health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire removes a random enemy and reduces that enemy’s max health by 20% for 7 sec.

description 4/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire removes a random enemy and reduces that enemy’s max health by 20% for 7 sec. In addition to removing a debuff from an ally, also increases their incoming damage and outgoing healing by 40% for 5 sec and restores 10% of their max health.

description 6/6

In addition to increasing an ally’s max health, Shield of the Empire removes a random enemy and reduces that enemy’s max health by 20% for 7 sec. In addition to removing a debuff from an ally, also increases their incoming damage and outgoing healing by 40% for 5 sec and restores 10% of their max health. When a debuff is removed by a set ability, Shield of the Empire silences a random enemy for 2 sec. During this time, the target can’t use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

Materials

Symbol of Order
Crossguard
